name: Bar Harbor Savings and Loan Association
description_short: Bar Harbor Savings & Loan Association is a community bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and online banking with over 100 years of local service.
description_long: Bar Harbor Savings & Loan Association has served its communities for more than 100 years, establishing itself as a longstanding financial institution rooted in personalized banking relationships. The company emphasizes direct community engagement and has built its reputation on knowing and caring for its customers over more than a century of operation. The bank offers traditional consumer and business banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, online banking platforms (both consumer and business), mortgages for home purchase and refinance, and competitive deposit rates. They provide both physical branch services and robust online banking capabilities, allowing customers to access their accounts remotely despite limited in-person hours. Bar Harbor Savings & Loan distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized service in a community banking model, contrasting with larger national banks. Their website explicitly references customer relationships and community care as core values, suggesting a relationship-based approach to banking rather than transactional service. The institution maintains competitive rates and appears focused on mortgage lending and asset management for local depositors. The bank operates with limited physical hours (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-4pm, closed weekends) and has minimal online information about specific product terms, rates, or fees. The website lacks detailed disclosures about account minimums, rate structures, mortgage terms, or service charges. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly for specific product information, pricing, and eligibility requirements.
services: Remote account access via online portal
pros: Over 100 years of community banking history and established reputation
Full-service banking with consumer and business online platforms
Advertises competitive deposit rates and mortgage rates
Personalized service model emphasizing customer relationships
Mortgage lending and asset management services available
Both online and physical banking options available
cons: Limited physical branch hours (Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm only, closed weekends)
Website lacks specific product details, rates, fees, and account minimums
No information about deposit insurance, FDIC status, or regulatory details
Minimal transparency on mortgage terms, APRs, or lending criteria
No mention of ATM network, card services, or product-specific features
best_for: Local residents in Bar Harbor, Maine seeking relationship-based community banking
Homebuyers interested in mortgage products from a local lender
Small business owners needing business banking services with personalized attention
Customers prioritizing traditional banking over digital-only neobanks
diagnosis: Bar Harbor Savings & Loan is best for local Maine residents and small business owners seeking personalized community banking with mortgage services. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent product information and limited physical availability; prospective customers must contact the bank directly for rates, terms, and specific service details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: Bar Harbor Savings and Loan Association
